row:
Main Gate – upto Rs. 1,00,000/-; Bifold MS Main Gate
Staircase & Balcony Railing (MS Steel) - Rs. 400/- per sq ft
Provision for invertor will be done as per the plan.
Structural Design Shall be Earth Quake Resistant.
Framed Structures with properly designed Columns and beams as per structural engineer’s/architect’s drawing.
Water curing will be done 2 times a day.
All Sunken Area Water Proofing using Dr.Fixit/Sika
The mixing of Cement, aggregate and dust aggregate(rori) shall be done with concrete mixers. On Site mixing shall be used for casting Columns (M-25), i.e., (1:1:2)
The use of Vibrators shall be made to consolidate the layers properly in footings, columns, Beams & roof slabs.
Cement Mortar for 9’’ brickwork shall not be leaner (1:6) and for 4½’’ brickwork cement mortar shall not be leaner than 1:4.
